chapters.title: The Station
chapters.content: Sophie stood at Tokyo Station with her ticket in hand. The bullet train to Kyoto would leave in ten minutes.

chapters.title: Window Seat
chapters.content: She sat by the window and watched the city disappear. Soon, green fields and mountains replaced the tall buildings.

chapters.title: First Sight
chapters.content: When she arrived in Kyoto, the peaceful streets and traditional temples made her feel like she had traveled back in time.
